name: libtext-markdown-discount-perl
title: libtext-markdown-discount-perl
summary: Perl interface to Discount, an implementation of Markdown
description:
Perl interface to Discount, an implementation of Markdown
Text::Markdown::Discount is a Perl module that implements the bindings to
discount, an implementation of John Gruber's Markdown markup language.
.
Given the performance of Discount, Text::Markdown::Discount processes markdown
formatted text quickly and passes the Markdown 1.0 test suite.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtext-markdown-discount-perl because Perl interface to Discount, an implementation of Markdown.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtext-markdown-discount-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtext-markdown-discount-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtext-markdown-discount-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
